creators.name: Nick Saraev
creators.blurb: Practical AI automation and agency builds from someone shipping real systems.

videos.title: I Built a $1M/y SaaS with Claude Code, Here's How
videos.summary: Nick Saraev built Clairvo, a SaaS product generating $1M/yr ARR that uses Claude Code and AI agents to improve call pickup rates through techniques like algorithmic predictive pacing and local number rotations. He argues that practical, revenue-focused automation and human moats (domain expertise, customer relationships) remain critical competitive advantages in the AI era.

videos.title: How to Build Mobile Apps with Claude Code: Full Course (2026)
videos.summary: Nick Saraev's full-length tutorial on building iOS and Android apps using Claude Code for code generation, Expo/React Native for the framework, and Supabase for backend and authentication. The course covers three complete app builds (habit tracker, calorie tracker with AI, Pomodoro) from setup through app store submission, including security audits and database integration.

videos.title: How to Use Claude Code for FREE (2026)
videos.summary: Nick Saraev demonstrates methods to use Claude Code with free or low-cost alternatives via NVIDIA-NIM, OpenRouter, Ollama, and DeepSeek V4 Flash. The video includes setup tutorials for each platform and covers both cloud-based and local model options.

videos.title: Claude Opus-4.7 Just Dropped, And...
videos.summary: Nick Saraev announces the release of Claude Opus 3.7 on his YouTube channel. The video is part of his content on AI automation and practical business applications, promoting related courses and tools on workflow automation and AI coding.
